name: aurora-tokens
title: Aurora Design System Tokens
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora CSS custom property token definitions for the full Aurora color, typography, shadow, and radius system.

theme.font-aurora-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace

light.aurora-shell-bg: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 0%, rgba(2, 136, 209, 0.06), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 88% 0%, rgba(1, 87, 155, 0.05), transparent 24%), var(--aurora-page-bg)

dark.aurora-active-glow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, #29b6f6 28%, transparent), 0 2px 8px color-mix(in srgb, #29b6f6 18%, transparent)
dark.aurora-font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace
dark.aurora-shell-bg: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 0%, rgba(41, 182, 246, 0.09), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 88% 0%, rgba(28, 127, 172, 0.10), transparent 24%), var(--aurora-page-bg)

docs:
Install this first.

It provides the Aurora token layer, shadcn token bridge, and base theme helpers used by the rest of the registry.

Import the generated stylesheet once at your app root before installing Aurora UI or block items.
